title: Entry March
cue: After the Tyler knocks once and the door is opened
lyrics: The Grand Team outside need to be able to hear the first note of this, so wait accordingly.
Stop this as the IM salutes.  Start it again after he salutes.  Stop it as he gets to the East.

title: Be Seated
cue: After the Proclaiming Officer says - Be Seated, Brethren.
lyrics: Keep an eye on the Proclaiming Officer.  If he sits, end the tune.  If he comes out to do Grand Honors, end it before he needs to talk

title: Grand FF
cue: FF

title: Escort SW to chair
cue: As the SW stands
lyrics: Be ready to hit stop when the PO gets back to his spot
Amaziung Grace

title: Escort JW to chair
cue: As the SW stands
lyrics: Be ready to hit stop when the PO gets back to his spot
Canon in D

title: All other Intros
cue: As needed
lyrics: Long enough for the IG also
Highland Cathedral

title: Collar Collect
cue: After the Grand Deacons stand up
lyrics: The Proclaiming Officer will have just retiring officers to remove their collars

title: Get the Master Elect
cue: After the Grand Deacons stand
lyrics: This happens as soon as the Installed Board is opened
Beethoven Sonata

title: Chaplain. SMIB
cue: Start it as he says - holy name
lyrics: ... thy most holy name
So Mote It Be
This is the end of the prayer by the Grand Officer in the Chaplain position

title: Before Thy Altar Kneel
cue: After the ME kneels and the Installing Master knocks
lyrics: O God, unseen, yet ever near, Thy Presence may we feel; And thus inspired with holy fear, Before Thine altar kneel.

title: Seal the VSL
cue: After the Installing Master says - Three Times on the VSL
lyrics: Keep thy tongue from evil; And thy lips that they speak no guile.

title: H.S.
cue: After the Proclaiming Officer addresses the WBros in the middle
lyrics: Finlandia.  If it finishes and they are still going, consider starting it again, maybe.

title: IG admits MMs etc
cue: After the IG turns to go to the door
lyrics: The PO asks the IG to admit EAs or other, then the IG will turn to do that.
March of the Angry Men

title: East FF
cue: FF

title: West FF
cue: FF

title: South FF
cue: FF

title: East Proclaim
file: audio/Installation/56 god bless our master true.mp3
cue: After the PO says - Be Seated Brethren
lyrics: God bless our Master new, With joy his life imbue, So mote it be; This then our fervent prayer, Grant of Thy strength a share, Truth for his watchword e'er, So mote it be.

title: West Proclaim
cue: After the PO says - Be Seated Brethren
lyrics: Let ev'ry Craftsman gather, with wish sincere to share; And welcome, with hearts glowing, our Master in the chair. God grant he rule us wisely, and to his trust be true, Then shall we ever proudly our loyalty renew.

title: South Proclaim
file: audio/Installation/58 great architect divine with song.mp3
cue: After the PO says - Be Seated Brethren
lyrics: Great Architect divine, with song, In this Thy temple now we throng, With grateful hearts to ask anew Thy blessings on our Master true.

title: Support to the Master
cue: After the Proclaiming officer has finished presenting the 1st WTs, Warrant, etc.
lyrics: Support to the Master, who rules by the Square, Let sons of the light to the East now repair; With hearts for his aid, united and free, Obedient we labour, obedient we labour, Obedient we labour, and kindly agree.

title: Support to the SW
file: audio/Installation/59.2 support to the Warden SW.mp3
cue: After the Sword finishes addressing the SW
lyrics: Support to the Warden, installed in the West, Who works by the Level, where sorrows may rest; With hearts for his aid, united and free, Obedient we labour, obedient we labour, Obedient we labour, and kindly agree.

title: Support to the JW
file: audio/Installation/59.3 support to the Warden JW.mp3
cue: After the Sword finishes addressing the JW
lyrics: Support to the Warden, by Plumb still upright, Whose sun in the South never hides its fair light; With hearts for his aid, united and free, Obedient we labour, obedient we labour, Obedient we labour, and kindly agree.
